name: Shanghai Sanyou Medical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Sanyou Medical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells orthopedics implants in China. The company offers spinal and trauma implants under Tytus and Sanyou brand. Its spinal products comprise anterior cervical plate, anterior thoracolumbar, posterior cervical, posterior thoracolumbar, and z-minimally invasive products; and trauma implants, including shoulder and elbow system, hip and pelvis system, knee system, knee system, and palm and wrist systems. Shanghai Sanyou Medical Co., Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.
